description: Reported OmniFocus inbox as having 205 items. That number came from the note field of a stale task written weeks ago — not from a live inbox count. Never queried actual current inbox size.
correction: David confirmed inbox has 11 items. The 205 figure was from an old task note, not live data.
systemic_fix: Inbox item counts must come from a live OmniFocus query, never from task note fields. Never read a number out of a note field and present it as current state.
